title: Software Engineering Internship
summary: Work alongside BMW engineers on next-generation vehicle software systems.
body:
Join BMW's Connected Drive team to develop software for in-vehicle infotainment, over-the-air updates, and driver assistance systems. You will work in an agile team using modern tools including Swift, Kotlin, C++, and cloud platforms.

**Requirements:**
- 2nd year or above in Software Engineering or Computer Science
- Strong programming fundamentals
- Interest in automotive technology

**Duration:** 12 weeks
**Location:** Munich, Germany or Brisbane

title: Data Science & AI Internship
summary: Apply machine learning to real automotive production and quality data.
body:
Work with BMW's data science team to build predictive models for manufacturing quality, supply chain optimisation, and customer experience personalisation.

**Requirements:**
- Strong Python skills (pandas, scikit-learn, PyTorch)
- Statistics background
- Experience with data visualisation

**Duration:** 12 weeks
**Location:** Brisbane (remote collaboration with Munich team)
